nasb.text: Then the shepherds came and drove them away, but Moses stood up and helped them and watered their flock.

esv.text: The shepherds came and drove them away, but Moses stood up and saved them, and watered their flock.

cnv.text: 有些牧人來了，把她們趕走；摩西卻起來，救了她們，也給她們的羊群喝水。

ccb.text: 这时，来了另外一群牧人要把她们赶走。摩西便起来帮助她们，打水饮她们的羊群。
